Campaigns.Name: Click & Collect
Campaigns.Description: This retailer participates in our online Click and Collect program. You may purchase a bicycle online and pick up in-store at this selected retailer. All bicycles are fully assembled and cannot be shipped. To learn more about our click and collect program please visit the Customer Support page at https://www.giant-bicycles.com/us/contact

Campaigns.Name: Home Delivery
Campaigns.Description: This retailer offers Home Delivery service for online orders. There is an additional order fee of $50 for Home Delivery. Bicycles will be delivered fully assembled by the local retailer. To learn more about Home Delivery please visit: https://www.giant-bicycles.com/us/homedelivery

All bicycles are fully assembled and cannot be shipped. To learn more about our click and collect program please visit the Customer Support page at https://www.giant-bicycles.com/us/contact

Campaigns.Name: Home Delivery
Campaigns.Description: This retailer offers Home Delivery service for online orders. There is an additional order fee of $50 for Home Delivery. All bicycles are fully assembled and cannot be shipped. To learn more about our click and collect program please visit the Customer Support page at https://www.giant-bicycles.com/us/contact
